problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
